subcodes.first_line: All the world awaiteth the Day of God, and with utmost humility and reverence imploreth from the Truth, exalted be His glory, the advent of the Promised One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمیع عالم منتظر یوم الله و بکمال خضوع و خشوع از حق جل جلاله ظهور موعود را در
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @Manifestation of God as sun, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness
